caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears large black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with several framed photographs and clothing on hangers, with a "LEE" label visible on some garments. To the left, a graphic logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and to the right, red text reads "BOSS TALK JOY." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a fixed position, primarily speaking and slightly adjusting his facial expressions while maintaining his gaze forward. The lighting remains consistent, and no other people enter the frame, leaving the man as the sole focus of the scene throughout the clip.
